contentBlocks.original:
ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः
सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः
सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु
मा कश्चिद्दुःखभाग्भवेत्
ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ sarve bhavantu sukhinaḥ
sarve santu nirāmayāḥ
sarve bhadrāṇi paśyantu
mā kaścid duḥkha bhāgbhavet
oṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ, May all beings be happy, may all be free from illness, may all witness auspiciousness, may no one suffer from sorrow. Oṃ, peace, peace, peace.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; सर्वे (sarve) – all; भवन्तु (bhavantu) – may be; सुखिनः (sukhinaḥ) – happy; सर्वे (sarve) – all; सन्तु (santu) – may be; निरामयाः (nirāmayāḥ) – free from illness; सर्वे (sarve) – all; भद्राणि (bhadrāṇi) – auspiciousness; पश्यन्तु (paśyantu) – may witness; मा (mā) – not; कश्चित् (kaścit) – anyone; दुःखभाग् (duḥkhabhāk) – part of sorrow (duḥkha:sorrow | bhāk:part); भवेत् (bhavet) – may be; ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace;
